UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCADAMS, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 230 WALLER ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522. JUDGMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
